verification.eslint_changed_files: clean (0 errors, 0 warnings in library/LibraryShelfHeading.tsx, index.ts, __tests__)

requirements_coverage.R5: met (partial test: button-variant h-11 not asserted)

findings.title: Touch-target assertion (h-11) only covers the <a> variant, not the <button> variant
findings.why: R5/AC-5 requires >=44x44px on both element variants of ShelfSeeAllLink. The h-11 class is asserted only on the anchor render path (line 193-199). The button render path would silently regress if the shared className were split.
findings.suggested_fix: Add a single assertion in the 'renders an inert <button>' or 'onClick' case: expect(button.className).toContain('h-11').

findings.title: Plan references '@/app/lib/utils' but the project convention is '@/app/components/ui/utils'
findings.why: The plan's Context section points callers at a non-existent path (src/app/lib/ does not exist). Implementation correctly used @/app/components/ui/utils. Cosmetic — doesn't affect shipped code — but future readers of the plan will be misled.
findings.suggested_fix: Update the plan reference to src/app/components/ui/utils.ts (or mark as historical).
